remember: Students will be able to define Geography as a discipline
Students will be able to explain the concept of spatiality
Students will be able to recall the evolution of the branch of geography
understand: Students will be able to explain the role of geography in understanding human and physical environments
Students will be able to describe the importance of spatial thinking in geography
Students will be able to relate the concept of scale in geography
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of spatiality and scale in real-life situations
Students will be able to use geographical tools and techniques to understand human and physical environments
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of human activities on the environment using geographical concepts
Students will be able to evaluate the importance of spatial thinking in decision-making

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of geography as a discipline.
Describe the evolution of geography as a discipline.
Explain the role of geography in understanding human and physical environments.
board_exam_objectives: Define geography as a discipline and explain its significance.
Describe the importance of spatial thinking in geography and its application in real-life situations.
Explain the concept of scale and its relevance in geography.
